titleStmt.title: SII 23.432: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 432. (A.R. No. 432 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on the same wall Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 26: 1293-94 A.D.

summary.p: The king is given the same title as in No. 431 above. The inscription registers the assignment of 21 mā of land in one block by the māhāsabhā, the paṇṇai-śeyvār and the vēli-śeyvār of Arikēsarinallūr and its entry in the tax-register (oḻugu) as dēvadāna under the ūr in favour of the temple of Rājasiṁhēśvaram-Uḍaiyār of the place in exchange (parikshētra) for three separate plots of dēvadāna land, one measuring 18 mā to the east of the stream called the Śuruḷiyāṟu, 2 mā belonging to goddess Durgā and 1 mā which had been sold already for the formation of tirumaḍai-viḷāgam. Arikēsarinallūr is referred to as a brahmadēya in Aḷa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāy keḷvikkumel śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉa cakravattikaḷ śrī Emmaṇṭalamumkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekarade vaṟku yāṇṭu 26vatu vaikāci mātam Aḷanāṭṭu brahmadeśam śrīarikecarinallūr mahāsabhaiyum paṇṇaiceyvārkaḷum velicey vārkaḷum Ivūr rājasimheśvaram
Uṭaiyārkoyil Āti taṇṭēśvaraṟku kalveṭṭi kuṭutta paricāvatu tenpiṭākai Aravārmaṅkalattiniṉṟum Ivūṟpaṟṟu vaṭatalai Aṟuti Āka cūruḷi Āṟṟukku kiḻakku Uḷḷa tevatāṉam tūṇinila Ākaiyāl Iṉnila Oḻukiṉpaṭi patiṉeṭṭaṭi nālviral kolāl nilam patiṉ Eṭṭu māvum
Ivūr turkkaiār(r) devatāṉam nilam Iraṇṭu māvum tirumaṭa viḷākattukku viṟṟa nilam Orumāvum Āka nilam Irupattorumāvum Ūṟpaṟṟāka Oḻukil māṭṭeṟintu parikṣetramāha kalveṭṭi kuṭutta nilam Irupattorumāvukkum perunāṉkellai Āvatu Erikkiḻ ciṟu maṭaipokkil kuṭutta
nilattukku perunāṉkellai Āvatu kiḻ Ellai kuḷakkaraikku meṟkum teṉṉellai teṅkam tiruvitikku vaṭakkum melellai Oḷḷattukku kiḻakkum vaṭaellai paṉaiyoṭu cey vaṭavarampil niṉṟum meṟku nokkippoṉa vāykkālukku teṟkum Āka Icainta peruṉāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa
nilam Irupattorumāvum parikṣetramāha kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom Āti taṇṭeśvaraṟku māhāsabhayum paṇṇai ceyvārkaḷum veliceyvār kaḷum Ippaṭikku tirupputtūr moci tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇa bhaṭṭaṉāṉa Aṇiyaraṅkadāsar Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku mokiliyaṉ cikaṇṭaṉ tiruppūlāntuṟaiyuṭaiyāṉāṉa tiru vallavāḷ nampi Eḻuttu Ivai niṉṟa nārāyaṇaṉ Āḷkoṇṭa piḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai cikaṇṭaṉ mātavappiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ivai cika ṇṭaṉ Uyyakkoṇṭāṉ
Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.432 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
